title: Korean Crumble Chewy Bites
description: A sweet and crunchy dessert made with chewy Korean rice cake bits, ginger, and a crumble topping.
instructions: In a large bowl, mix together chopped Korean rice cakes, grated ginger, and 1/4 cup granulated sugar.
In a separate bowl, whisk together flour and remaining 3/4 cup granulated sugar.
Add crumble topping to the bowl with the flour mixture and mix until crumbly.
Add the crumble mixture to the bowl with the Korean rice cake mixture and mix until combined.
Spoon the mixture into a baking dish and bake for 25-30 minutes or until golden brown.
